title: Input combinatorial debug
body:
After a small change to a design we noticed a significant performance regression in our sims.  Using `--prof-cfuncs` we were able to track it down to one offending block in the RTL.  The resultant C++ has gone from an `__nba_sequent__` to an `__ico_sequent__` function and is now being called by not only `__eval_nba()` but also by `__eval_ico()`.  The latter is happening a lot.

Is there a simple way to determine what is causing this block to now be marked as input combinatorial?  I assume the graphviz diagrams would show me, but the design is large and I'm wondering if there's a simpler / faster way.
